title: homalium stelliferum subsp. stelliferum
intro: Homalium stelliferum subsp. stelliferum, also known as the star-fruit Homalium, is a plant species in the family Salicaceae. It is a woody shrub native to tropical Africa, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from digestive discomfort. Homalium stelliferum subsp. stelliferum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal purposes.
